No Poverty.reason: No explicit or inferred evidence in the course syllabus relates to poverty eradication or social protection measures.

Zero Hunger.reason: No explicit or inferred evidence in the course syllabus relates to hunger, food security, or sustainable agriculture.

Quality Education.reason: As a university course, it provides quality tertiary education (Target 4.3) and teaches data analysis methods, a relevant skill for employment (Target 4.4).

Affordable and Clean Energy.reason: No explicit or inferred evidence in the course syllabus relates to energy access, renewable energy, or energy efficiency.

Decent Work and Economic Growth.reason: The course develops professional judgment and data analysis skills, contributing to higher economic productivity (Target 8.2) and preparing students for decent work (Target 8.5).

Industry, Innovation and Infrastructure.reason: Teaching data analysis methods and statistical software enhances technological capabilities and fosters innovative thinking (Target 9.5).

Reduced Inequalities.reason: No explicit or inferred evidence in the course syllabus relates to reducing income inequality or promoting social inclusion.

Sustainable Cities and Communities.reason: No explicit or inferred evidence in the course syllabus relates to urban development, housing, or sustainable communities.

Life on Land.reason: No explicit or inferred evidence in the course syllabus relates to terrestrial ecosystems, biodiversity, or land degradation.
